summary: Clear, punchy matrix recording with occasional channel‑reversal quirks
review: The file appears to be a hybrid (matrix) source – the first set is a clean soundboard feed while the second set sounds like audience tape, giving it good overall clarity and separation. Reviewers note a pleasant “punch” in the mix but also point out reversed stereo channels and the odd SBD/AUD split, which keeps the recording from being flawless.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive remarks about clarity and punch are balanced by reports of channel reversal and inconsistent source types; limited musical commentary lowers certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, punchy sound with good separation; first set is soundboard, second set audience. Reviewers note reversed left/right channels (Brent on left, Bob on right) and possible upload error mixing sources.
